prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年物理类（原理科）最低位次约4709→3351→2772→2681，整体呈持续前移趋势，近3年累计前移约2028名；2025年基准约2681名；该校 在四川物理类计划2022年163人、2023年171人、2024年171人、2025年152人；2026年计划162人，较2025年扩招10人（+6.6%），扩招幅度有限，对竞争格局影响较小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度总排名第74（一般），短视频曝光以大国重器、军工研发为主，整体 关注度中等；航空宇航科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A+、材料科学与工程A+，另有机械工程A、信息与通信工程A-、控制科学与工程A-等，王牌学科与招生 专业高度匹配，对优质生源吸引力极强；985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第23名，近年稳定在21–25名区间，属于国内顶尖工科院校，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、航空航天类等核心专业社会热度持续偏高；四川省2026年高考报名总人数约53.5万，较 2025年约46.3万增加约15.6%，物理类考生估算约32.9万，竞争加剧；西北工业大学位于陕西西安，属中西部地区，四川 考生对西安高校接受度较高，跨省报考无明显地域障碍。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年小幅扩招（+6.6%）、四川省考生总数大幅增加（+15.6%）以及学 校顶尖工科实力与王牌专业热度，考生增加带来的竞争加剧效应超过扩招的缓解效应，预计2026年位次在2025年2681名基础上继续小幅前移。预测最低位次约2757名，区间2343–3 171名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (formerly Science) was approximately 4709 → 3351 → 2772 → 2681, showing a continuous upward trend, with a cumulative advancement of about 2028 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 2681; the university's Physics Category enrollment plan in Sichuan was 163 in 2022, 171 in 2023, 171 in 2024, and 152 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 162, an increase of 10 students (+6.6%) compared to 2025, a limited expansion with little impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents, which may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranks 74th overall (average), with short video exposure mainly focusing on national heavy equipment and military R&D, overall attention is moderate; Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, plus Mechanical Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, etc., the flagship disciplines highly match the enrollment majors, strongly attracting high-quality students; 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 23rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 21–25 range in recent years, belonging to the top domestic engineering schools, with sustained strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as Computer, Electronic Information, and Aerospace Engineering continue to have high social popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Sichuan Gaokao is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to about 463,000 in 2025, with an estimated 329,000 Physics Category candidates, intensifying competition; Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, in the central and western region, and Sichuan candidates have a high acceptance of universities in Xi'an, with no obvious regional barriers for cross-province applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the small enrollment expansion in 2026 (+6.6%), the significant increase in the number of Sichuan candidates (+15.6%), and the university's top engineering strength and flagship major popularity, the intensifying competition effect from the increase in candidates outweighs the mitigating effect of the expansion. It is expected that the 2026 ranking will continue to advance slightly from the 2025 ranking of 2681. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2757, with a range of 2343–3171.

- Aerospace Engineering (Smart Three Aerospace Top Talent Class)
- Computer Category (Computer Science)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 2757, with a range of 2343–3171. It is recommended that candidates with rankings above the upper limit (3171) mainly use Tier 3 as a safety option; candidates with rankings in the middle range (around 2757) mainly use Tier 2 with Tier 3 as a safety; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (2343) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Aerospace Engineering top talent class, Computer Science top talent class).

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (formerly Liberal Arts) was approximately 2662 → 2645 → 2158 → 2658, showing significant fluctuations. In 2024, it moved forward to 2158, but rebounded to 2658 in 2025. The baseline for 2025 is about 2658. The university's enrollment plan for Liberal Arts/History Category in Sichuan was 10 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 12 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 17, an increase of 5 (+41.7%) compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion that will greatly alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 23rd, making it a top engineering institution, but its liberal arts programs are not its strengths. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), which may suppress the willingness of liberal arts candidates to apply. Its overall Douyin popularity ranks 74th (average), with limited exposure to liberal arts. Northwestern Polytechnical University is known for engineering, and its liberal arts enrollment majors (Economics and Trade, Foreign Languages and Literature, Marxist Theory) have no corresponding A-level discipline evaluations, so their disciplinary advantages are not prominent.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of liberal arts majors is stable, with no clear signs of warming. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category candidates in Sichuan is about 206,000, an increase of about 15.7% from approximately 178,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. The university is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi. Sichuan candidates have a relatively high acceptance of universities in Xi'an, but the university's liberal arts scale is small with few majors, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as large fluctuations in historical rankings, significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+41.7%), an increase in total candidates (+15.7%), and the fact that liberal arts majors are not the university's strength, the mitigating effect of expansion outweighs the competitive effect of increased candidates. It is expected that the 2026 ranking will continue to move back from the 2025 baseline of 2658. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3343, with a range of 2843–3843.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Marxist Theory
- Economics and Trade (International Trade, Law, Administrative Management)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (English, German)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 3343, with a range of 2843–3843. Northwestern Polytechnical University only offers 3 majors in the History Category in Sichuan, with little difference between tiers. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 3343) are advised to focus on Economics and Trade and Marxist Theory. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (2843) can aim for all majors. Candidates with rankings outside the upper limit (3843) should apply cautiously.
